name: Accounts Receivable and Collections Specialist Readiness Evidence

authority_sources.name: AICPA Professional Standards
authority_sources.rationale: Provides guidance on professional conduct and ethical standards for accounting professionals including collections practices
authority_sources.decay_handling: Monitor for updates to ethical guidelines and professional conduct rules

authority_sources.name: IFAC International Standards
authority_sources.rationale: Establishes international auditing and assurance standards that impact collections practices
authority_sources.decay_handling: Track changes to IAASB standards affecting audit and collection procedures

authority_sources.name: Fair Debt Collection Practices Act (FDCPA)
authority_sources.rationale: Regulates debt collection activities to protect consumers
authority_sources.decay_handling: Monitor for regulatory updates and enforcement actions

risk_assessment.regulatory_risk: Non-compliance with fair debt collection practices
